Description: Face recognition dataset containing 15 individuals represented by multiple visual feature views.
News articles collected from BBC, Reuters, and The Guardian, where each source forms a separate view.
Image dataset with multiple visual feature representations including color, texture, and shape descriptors.
Sports news articles grouped into five categories and represented by multiple textual views.
Protein fold recognition dataset with multiple biological and structural feature views.
University web pages represented by textual content and hyperlink-derived features.
Reuters news dataset represented in multiple language-specific feature spaces.
Larger Reuters multilingual dataset used for multi-view text clustering.
Plant leaf dataset with three complementary botanical feature views.
Handwritten digit dataset represented by six different feature extractors.
Multi-feature handwritten digit dataset derived from the UCI repository.
Outdoor scene recognition dataset represented using multiple visual descriptors.
MNIST handwritten digits represented using four complementary feature views.
Large-scale MNIST multi-view benchmark with 10,000 samples.
Amsterdam Library of Object Images represented through multiple visual feature views.
